title: Biituian
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Biituian.png]] |name=Biituian |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |haircolor=Bald''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Biitu]] |habitat= |diet=[[Unidentified Biituian fruit tree|Unnamed fruit]] |language=[[Biituian (language)|Biituian]] }} {{Quote|The Biituians aren't running some Tatooine-style ''black-market''. They're commissioned by the Senate.|[[Rex/Legends|Rex]], to [[Coric]]|{{TCWComicCite|6.33|A Small Scrappy War!}}}} '''Biituians''' were a [[near-Human]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] race indigenous to [[Biitu]]. ==Biology and appearance== The Biituians were a [[Species/Legends|species]] who resembled mainline [[Human/Legends|Humans]] in many respects, with the only difference between the two being their green skin. Like Humans, members of the species had the standard [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] frame and facial features. Members of the species wore loose-fitting attire made of cloth which usually revealed their midsections. All the members of this species wore some form of headgear which concealed the top of their heads. ==Society and culture== {{Quote|Greetings, greetings! ''Welcome'' to the ''Pitor'' Plantworks! My, my! Oh yes, ''welcome''!''"
"''''Excitable'' fellow, isn't he?|[[Pitor]] and [[Coric]]|}} The Biituians of Biitu had a very peaceful lifestyle and culture that mainly focused on agricultural endeavors such as farming and harvesting the fruits that grew on the [[Unidentified Biituian fruit tree|native trees]] of their homeworld. Their architecture was simple and they were not very industrious as only few buildings and structures dotted their mostly untouched green valleys. They were also very friendly and welcoming to off-worlders. However, due to their peaceful nature, they were defenseless against powerful armed foes. ==History== Around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], the Biituians were enjoying their peaceful existence until the arrival of the tyrannical [[Great Heep]], who, with the aid of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], was able to conquer Biitu and deplete its water supply. Luckily, thanks to the efforts of [[Mungo Baobab]] and his friends [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[Fidge Tadrazan|Fidge]] and [[Chubb]], they were able to free the planet from the Empire and put an end to the Great Heep. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Biituians}} *{{TCWComicCite|6.33|A Small Scrappy War!}} *{{DroidsCite|The Great Heep}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Biituian }} [[Category:Human and Near-Human species]] [[Category:Outer Rim Territories sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Biituians]] }}
